tasks.label: Install dependencies
tasks.command: source ~/.zshrc && nvm use && npx env-cmd -- corepack pnpm install

tasks.label: Clean dependencies
tasks.command: source ~/.zshrc && nvm use && npx env-cmd -- corepack pnpm clean

tasks.label: Start Backend
tasks.command: source ~/.zshrc && nvm use && npx env-cmd -- corepack pnpm --filter @vao/backend dev

tasks.label: Start External API
tasks.command: source ~/.zshrc && nvm use && npx env-cmd -- corepack pnpm --filter @vao/external-api dev

tasks.label: Start Cron
tasks.command: source ~/.zshrc && nvm use && npx env-cmd -- corepack pnpm --filter @vao/cron dev

tasks.label: Start Frontend BO
tasks.command: source ~/.zshrc && nvm use && npx env-cmd -- corepack pnpm --filter @vao/frontend-bo dev

tasks.label: Start Frontend Usagers
tasks.command: source ~/.zshrc && nvm use && npx env-cmd -- corepack pnpm --filter @vao/frontend-usagers dev

tasks.label: Start Migrations
tasks.command: source ~/.zshrc && nvm use && npx env-cmd -- corepack pnpm --filter @vao/migrations exec knex --cwd ./src migrate:latest

tasks.label: Start Seeds (e2e)
tasks.command: source ~/.zshrc && nvm use && SEEDS_DIR=e2e npx env-cmd -- corepack pnpm --filter @vao/migrations exec knex --cwd ./src/ seed:run
